problem_statement: The checkout service (port 8080) is unreachable. Customers cannot complete orders.

app-logs.text: HTTP 503 — upstream connect error, service 'checkout' unreachable
timeout waiting for connection to checkout-pod-7b on port 8080
retry 3/3 failed for checkout-pod-7b:8080 — giving up
upstream health check failed for checkout backend pool
INFO request processed in 42ms — order #88123 confirmed

k8s-events.text: Pod checkout-pod-7b evicted from node worker-3
Eviction manager: pod checkout-pod-7b exceeds ephemeral-storage resource limits
Pod payment-pod-3a running on node worker-2 — healthy
Scheduled pod checkout-pod-7b on node worker-3

node-metrics.text: disk usage on /var/lib/kubelet reached 94%, eviction threshold is 90%
Container runtime storage: used 32Gi of 34Gi, available 2Gi
Image garbage collection freed 0 bytes — no unused images
disk usage on /var/lib/kubelet reached 88%, approaching eviction threshold

network-logs.text: GigabitEthernet0/0/0: Interface is up, line protocol is up
OSPF adjacency on Gi0/0/0 Full, no changes detected
No BGP neighbor state changes in last 24 hours
All trunk ports operational — VLAN 100,200,300 active
No denied flows to 10.0.0.0/8 in last 60 minutes

expected_root_cause: DiskPressure on node worker-3 caused by ephemeral storage exhaustion (94% usage, 90% threshold). Kubelet evicted checkout-pod-7b, leaving the checkout-app deployment with 0 available replicas and making the service unreachable.
